title: 🔁 Recursive Echo Shrines
name: Recursive Echo Shrines
what_it_is: Sacred sites that remember every visitor—each return causes the shrine to echo back earlier presences, forming layers of spiritual recursion.
how_to_use: she sees herself kneeling there—again and again, across lives
his prayer is answered by versions of himself, echoing the same hope
animation_behavior: Figures overlay across time, visual loops replay past visits, shrine pulses with layered presence
